% check a.php
a.php:13:3: $n is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:14:3: $another is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:22:3: $x is of type: int (DEBUG)
a.php:24:10: class method Foo::do does not exist
a.php:29:3: $val is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:32:3: $y is of type: Foo (DEBUG)
a.php:33:3: $this is of type: Foo (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:9:3: $a is of type: stdClass (DEBUG)
b.php:17:1: $i is of type: int (DEBUG)

% check c.php
c.php:16:1: $i is of type: Employees\Worker (DEBUG)

% check d.php
d.php:10:3: $x is of type: Utils\Container (DEBUG)

% check e.php
e.php:12:3: $a is of type: My\Employees\Person (DEBUG)
e.php:14:3: $a is of type: My\Employees\Worker (DEBUG)

% check f.php
# No errors.

% check conditional.php
conditional.php:14:2: $x is of type: Cond\Foo (DEBUG)

% check g.php
g.php:13:3: $a is of type: Guards\Animal (DEBUG)
g.php:17:3: $a is of type: Guards\Dog (DEBUG)
g.php:21:3: $a is of type: Guards\Animal (DEBUG)
g.php:23:4: $a is of type: Guards\Dog (DEBUG)
g.php:25:3: $a is of type: Guards\Animal (DEBUG)

% check h.php
h.php:15:2: $p is of type: Guards\Dog|Guards\Cat (DEBUG)
h.php:17:3: $p is of type: Guards\Dog (DEBUG)
h.php:20:2: $p is of type: Guards\Cat (DEBUG)

% check union-member.php
# No errors.

% check list.php
list.php:11:2: $a is of type: string (DEBUG)
list.php:12:2: $b is of type: string (DEBUG)
list.php:15:2: $c is of type: string (DEBUG)
list.php:16:2: $d is of type: string (DEBUG)
list.php:19:2: $e is of type: string (DEBUG)
list.php:22:2: $g is of type: string (DEBUG)
list.php:23:2: $h is of type: string (DEBUG)
list.php:26:2: $i is of type: string (DEBUG)

% check union-foreach.php
union-foreach.php:19:3: $item is of type: UnionForeach\Alpha|UnionForeach\Beta (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

/**
 * @property int $number
 */
class Foo
{
	private string $name;

	protected function process(string $another): string
	{
		$n = $this->name;
		#debugType $n
		#debugType $another
	}

	public void $number;

	private function check()
	{
		$x = $this->number;
		#debugType $x

		$this->do(function() use ($x) {
			echo $x;
		});

		$val = $this->process($x);
		#debugType $val

		$y = $this;
		#debugType $y
		#debugType $this
	}
}
-- b.php --
<?php

namespace Path\To\Module;

class Bar
{
	private function watch(\stdClass $a, ?array $x, $y = 'default', $z = [])
	{
		#debugType $a
	}

	private function switch($msg = Foo\Bar::BAZ_CONST, $opt = array('R' => 128)): ?int;
}

$b = new Bar;
$i = $b->switch();
#debugType $i
-- c.php --
<?php

namespace Employees;

class Person
{
	public function identity(): static;
}

class Worker extends Person
{
}

$w = new Worker;
$i = $w->identity();
#debugType $i
-- d.php --
<?php

namespace Utils;

class Container
{
	static function create(): self
	{
		$x = new self;
		#debugType $x
		return $x;
	}
}
-- e.php --
<?php

namespace Utils;

use My\Employees;
use function assert;

class Config
{
	function pass(Employees\Person $a)
	{
		#debugType $a
		assert($a instanceof Employees\Worker);
		#debugType $a
	}
}
-- assert-prop.php --
<?php

namespace AssertProp;

class Foo
{
	/** @var mixed */
	public $bar;

	function test(): void
	{
		assert($this->bar instanceof \Utils\Config);
		#debugType $this->bar
	}

	function testIf(): void
	{
		if ($this->bar instanceof \Utils\Config) {
			#debugType $this->bar
		}
	}

	function testKeywordProp(): void
	{
		assert($this->class instanceof \Utils\Config);
		#debugType $this->class
	}
}
-- f.php --
<?php

/**
 * @property float $balance
 */
#[\AllowDynamicProperties]
class AccountInfo
{
}

$i = new AccountInfo;
$i->balance;
$i->undeclaredProp;
-- conditional.php --
<?php
namespace Cond;

class Foo
{
	/**
	 * @return ($throw is true ? self : ?self)
	 */
	public function clone(bool $throw = true): ?self {}
}

function test(Foo $f) {
	$x = $f->clone();
	#debugType $x
}
-- g.php --
<?php
namespace Guards;

class Animal {
	public string $name;
}
class Dog extends Animal {
	public string $breed;
}

class Checker {
	function check(Animal $a) {
		#debugType $a
		if (!$a instanceof Dog) {
			throw new \Exception('not a dog');
		}
		#debugType $a
	}

	function checkPositive(Animal $a) {
		#debugType $a
		if ($a instanceof Dog) {
			#debugType $a
		}
		#debugType $a
	}
}
-- h.php --
<?php
namespace Guards;

class Cat extends Animal {
	public string $color;
}

class Vet {
	/** @return Dog|Cat */
	function getPatient(): Animal {}
}

function checkUnion(Vet $v) {
	$p = $v->getPatient();
	#debugType $p
	if ($p instanceof Dog) {
		#debugType $p
		return;
	}
	#debugType $p
}
-- union-member.php --
<?php
namespace UnionMember;

class Company {
	public string $name;
}

class Service {
	/** @return int|Company */
	function getResult(): mixed {}
}

function test(Service $s) {
	$r = $s->getResult();
	$r->name;
}
-- list.php --
<?php
namespace ListAssign;

class Foo {
	/** @return string[] */
	public function names(): array {}
}

function test(Foo $f) {
	[$a, $b] = $f->names();
	#debugType $a
	#debugType $b

	list($c, $d) = $f->names();
	#debugType $c
	#debugType $d

	list(, $e) = $f->names();
	#debugType $e

	[$g, $h] = $f->names();
	#debugType $g
	#debugType $h

	list($f->prop, $i) = $f->names();
	#debugType $i
}

-- union-foreach.php --
<?php
namespace UnionForeach;

class Alpha {
	public string $name;
}

class Beta {
	public string $name;
}

class Repo {
	/** @return Alpha[]|Beta[] */
	function getItems(): array {}
}

function test(Repo $r) {
	foreach ($r->getItems() as $item) {
		#debugType $item
		$item->name;
	}
}
